name: Instant Webhook to Telegram Bot Notification
description: Receives incoming webhooks from any app or website and instantly forwards notifications to your Telegram chat or group.
plainEnglishSummary: Listens for incoming webhooks at your unique n8n URL.
Sends an instant alert directly to your Telegram chat or group.

requiredUserInputs.label: Telegram Chat ID or @channel
requiredUserInputs.setupGuide: Search for @BotFather in Telegram, create a bot to get your API Token, then put your Chat ID or @channel username here!
